description_long: This sculpture is a dark, roughly textured bust of a human head mounted on a square pedestal. The facial features are expressive, with pronounced cheekbones, a furrowed brow, and curly hair rendered in a stylized, almost impressionistic manner. The material appears to be a dark bronze or similar metal, with a matte, slightly uneven finish that highlights the sculptural details. The base is a simple, solid block, possibly made of stone or a similar heavy material, and features a small, partially torn label with handwritten text. The overall form is compact and solid, with the head slightly larger than life-size and the base providing stable support. The sculpture exudes a sense of gravitas and artistic intent, suitable for display in public or semi-public urban spaces.
description: A dark, textured bust of a human head with expressive features, mounted on a square pedestal. The sculpture has a matte finish and a solid, compact form.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the head with textured, curly hair and the square pedestal base.
description_view_1: Right profile view highlighting the prominent nose, lips, and the detailed hair texture.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying the expressive face, deep-set eyes, and the overall symmetry of the bust.
description_view_3: Left profile view showing the side of the face, ear, and the sculpted hair.
attribute_location_context: No clear environmental context is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
